
```{r}
# restart R completely
.rs.restartR()
```

```{r}
devtools::document()
remove.packages("brfssTools")
```

```{r}
# restart R completely
.rs.restartR()
```

```{r warning=FALSE}
devtools::install_local("C:/My Documents/R Projects/brfssTools",
                        quick = FALSE,
                        build_vignettes = TRUE,
                        upgrade = "never",
                        force = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# restart R completely
.rs.restartR()
```

```{r}
library(brfssTools)
?brfssTools
vignette("getting-started", package = "brfssTools")  # Includes Common workflows now
```

```{r}
path <- "~/data-repo/oha__behavioral_risk_factor_surveillance_system/annual"

# 1. Pool registration — typical case
brfss_set_pool("National", data_path = path)
brfss_status()
# Should show OR with the data path, default codebook_path, default crosswalk path
```

```{r}
# Draft from the most recent year of CDC data
# brfss_draft_crosswalk(dataset = "National")
```

```{r}
# Open the editor
brfss_crosswalk_editor(dataset = "National")
```
